title: Frontend Developer
description: We are looking for a skilled Frontend Developer to join our team.
responsibilities: Build reusable code and libraries for future use
Optimize application for maximum speed and scalability
requirements: Proven work experience as a Frontend Developer
Hands on experience with markup languages
Familiarity with browser testing and debugging

title: React Developer
description: Join our fast-growing startup as a React Developer.
requirements: In-depth knowledge of JavaScript and React
Experience with state management libraries like Redux
Good communication skills

title: MERN Stack Developer
description: Looking for a full stack engineer proficient in the MERN stack.
responsibilities: Design and launch frontend and backend features
Maintain code quality and deployment pipelines
requirements: Solid experience with MERN stack development
Familiarity with cloud hosting services (AWS/Heroku)
Strong problem solving skills

title: Java Backend Developer
description: Seeking a Senior Java Backend Developer to scale our enterprise infrastructure.
responsibilities: Optimize database queries and transaction logic
requirements: Expertise in Java and Spring Boot framework
Experience with relational databases and SQL optimization
Familiarity with CI/CD concepts

title: UI Developer
description: Translate beautiful designs into semantic and pixel-perfect web pages.
responsibilities: Build UI components from design mockups
Ensure visual consistency and responsive design
requirements: Proficient in HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
Familiarity with design tools like Figma or Sketch
Keen eye for typography and layout

title: web developer
description: We are looking for a skilled Frontend Developer to build modern, responsive, and high-performance web applications. The candidate should have strong experience in React.js, JavaScript, and UI development. You will collaborate with designers, backend developers, and product teams to deliver scalable user-friendly applications.
responsibilities: Collaborate with backend and product teams
Fix bugs and improve user experience
requirements: 2+ years frontend development experience
Strong knowledge of React.js
Good understanding of JavaScript ES6+
Experience with Tailwind CSS or Bootstrap
Knowledge of REST APIs
Good problem-solving skills
